name: indian-market-scanner-orchestrator
description: Sandcastle orchestrator for the auto paper-trading bot. The bot itself lives in bot/. This package.json is for running the Codex multi-agent loop only.

scripts.sandcastle: sh -lc 'set -a; [ -f .sandcastle/.env ] && . .sandcastle/.env; set +a; docker build -t sandcastle:indian-market-scanner .sandcastle && npx tsx .sandcastle/main.mts'
